settingsDesc: Customize the platform language and general options for your site.
dailyStatusDescriptionText: Write your daily clinic status here (e.g., exceptional attendance times, substitute doctor, expected congestion, emergency closure). The chatbot will use this phrase to automatically update all its answers to patients today!
dailyStatusTextareaPlaceholder: Write daily clinic status here... (e.g. Dentist is present today from 10 AM to 8 PM, we recommend booking in advance to avoid waiting)
clinicProfileDesc: Basic static data to introduce the chatbot to your location and contact details
platformFree: In-Platform: 100% Free & Unlimited for Doctor & Patients! 🆓
outsidePlatform: Off-Platform Notification Channels (WhatsApp, Telegram, Messenger, Instagram):
alert10Percent: Warning: Off-platform alert message balance is low (less than 10% remaining)!
alertExpired: Notice: Off-platform subscription has expired! Automated WhatsApp/Telegram notifications are paused, but the in-platform chat and bookings remain 100% free and unlimited ✓
previewBarLabel: You are currently in live preview mode for patients of
returnedToSaaSNotif: Returned to Shafi SaaS Platform successfully!
adminModeDesc: You are currently in the clinic admin panel to customize the chatbot and manage appointments.
previewClinicBtn: Preview Live Clinic Site for Your Patients 🌐
copyrightLabel: © 2026 {clinic} - All rights reserved to the clinic.
madeWithSkill: Crafted with skill to empower medical clinics with secure AI
saasCopyright: © 2026 Shafi Smart AI - Clinic Chatbot Training & Management Platform. All rights reserved.
saasFooterNote: Crafted with passion to empower clinics with secure and precise AI
statusReady: Ready to receive your medical bookings today 🟢
statusClosed: The clinic is currently closed outside working hours 🕒
statusFull: Sorry, bookings are fully booked today 🔴
clinicMotto: Your health is our passion and primary responsibility
clinicSubDesc: Welcome to our premium clinic under the supervision of Dr. {doctor}. We strive to provide the highest levels of medical quality and comfort to our valued patients, and we provide you with a unique medical chatbot to facilitate your bookings and provide instant reliable answers to your questions 24/7.
descServices: We offer a comprehensive package of health services with the highest medical standards and transparent pricing.
loadingServicesDesc: Please Doctor, enter the admin dashboard to select a clinic preset.
chatBannerSub: Online to answer your queries and book your appointment instantly
chatDesc: Speak directly with the clinic's smart chatbot at any time! The chatbot is programmed with a strict knowledge isolation system, meaning it will answer you with absolute accuracy about prices, procedures, and instructions specified by Dr. {doctor}, and guarantees you a fast and secure booking in seconds.
feat1Desc: The chatbot will not make medical guesses, it strictly follows approved clinic protocols and prices.
feat2Desc: It automatically checks daily booking limits and rejects bookings when fully booked to protect clinic schedule.
feat3Desc: It registers your requests and sends appointment details instantly to the dashboard for us to contact and confirm.
aboutClinicText: We proudly work at {clinic} to provide the highest standards of care and integrated medical treatments, ensuring a sterile, healthy, and comfortable environment.
aboutDoctorText: Under the permanent supervision of Dr. {doctor}, we guarantee the application of the best international medical protocols using the latest technologies.
hoursDays: Saturday to Thursday (Friday is the weekend holiday)
faqDesc: Get direct, fast, doctor-approved answers to important questions and treatment guidelines before your visit.
botDefaultUpdateText: The clinic is operating on official hours. Welcome anytime!
platformDesc: An integrated platform to connect clinics with patients and facilitate treatment bookings with high security and reliability using exclusive medical AI engines.
welcomeMessage:
Welcome to "{clinicName}" Chatbot! 🌸
I am your smart assistant programmed to answer accurately and exclusively about the clinic's services, prices, and guidelines.
How can I help you today?
botOutsideHours:
Sorry, we are currently outside the official working hours of the clinic. 🕒

Please leave your details or phone number and the clinic team will contact you as soon as the next official working hours begin to coordinate and book your appointment!
botLimitReached:
We deeply apologize, the maximum number of bookings available for today at the clinic has been reached ({max} bookings). 🔴

Please contact us directly by phone to register your name on the waiting list, or try again tomorrow to book a new appointment. Thank you for your understanding!
botBookingSystemReady:
Welcome to the smart direct booking system! 📅
Please fill out the booking form below to register your appointment instantly in the doctor's control panel and we will contact you to confirm.
botBookingSuccessDesc: Your request has been instantly recorded in the doctor's dashboard. The chatbot received your booking successfully and we will call you to confirm.
botInputPlaceholder: Ask the chatbot or type your question here...
botBookingTriggerResponse: Welcome! Please fill out the appointment booking form below.
reportCopied: Full report text copied to clipboard! 📋
noBookingsMatch: No registered bookings match your search currently
tryChatbotLeft: Try the chatbot on the left to book an appointment and monitor it here instantly!
botAttachedImageDesc: Ready to send with your message
botPlaceholderText: Type your message to the smart medical assistant here...
avgWaitingTimeCardDesc: Advanced analytical indices to monitor patient flow, evaluate congestion, and compare morning vs. evening wait rates to optimize schedule spacing.
recLowWait: The current state is excellent! Patient flow is swift and smoothly spaced; your appointment slots are perfectly managed.
recMediumWait: Waiting times are moderate and within safe boundaries. We suggest alerting patients via chatbot to arrive 5 minutes early to avoid minor overlaps.
recHighWait: Waiting times are relatively high due to peak demands and booking density. We advise expanding the service interval by an extra 5 minutes.
trafficTrendByHour: Traffic Congestion & Expected Wait Time by Hour 📊
quickActionsDesc: Create and edit the quick buttons patients see at the start of the conversation. Clicking on them yields a guaranteed 100% pre-programmed response instantly to save valuable time.
noQuickActions: No quick buttons defined. Add one above to start.
servicesTableDesc: List of medical services offered by the doctor with standard pricing so the chatbot can refer to them accurately.
serviceDescPlaceholder: Details and descriptions of this service...
noServicesInDb: No services defined in database yet. Use the Excel/CSV Import tab to fill them instantly!
guidelinesDesc: Specific guidelines or requirements for patients prior to arrival or after a procedure, which the chatbot will explain clearly.
guidelineTitlePlaceholder: Guideline Title (e.g., Fasting before Blood Test)
guidelineContentPlaceholder: Write detailed instructions simply for patients here...
noGuidelinesInDb: No guidelines programmed in database currently.
comprehensiveIntroTitle: Clinic Overview, CV, Services & Working Hours 🏥
comprehensiveIntroDesc: Edit and format your clinic profile so the chatbot can extract accurate and comprehensive answers.
writeIntroLabel: Write the detailed clinic overview here:
introPlaceholder: e.g., Our clinic is dedicated to offering integrated healthcare... (click the button above to load a ready example)
introNoteText: * This paragraph is used directly by the AI Engine to answer general inquiries about services, timings, CV, and credentials.
suggestIntroNotification: Suggested template loaded! You can now edit and save changes 💡
importTitle: Smart & Direct Data Import from Excel / CSV 📊
importDesc: Instead of manual typing, simply copy your table from Microsoft Excel and paste it here! The smart system auto-identifies columns and updates the chatbot.
importStep2Desc: Open your Excel sheet, highlight the table, press Ctrl+C, then click and paste in the field below with Ctrl+V.
demoPasteLoadedNotif: Demo paste filled! Press the Import button below to save 📋
parsedPreviewLabel: Preview Extracted Records Ready for Import
backupDesc: Keep all your designs and services safe. Export and import database files instantly.
backupShieldDesc: Protect everything you configured. Download the entire configuration as a JSON file and restore it in seconds on any browser!
marketingGuideTitle: Your Golden Guide to Selling This App to Clinics 💰
marketingGuideIntro: This application is highly demanded because it automates clerical reception and answers queries with 100% precision. Here is how to market it:
marketingStep1Desc: Create a quick mock profile for a local clinic, open it on your phone, visit them, and let them test chat live!
marketingStep2Desc: Assure doctors the chatbot is safe due to cognitive containment. It never hallucinates or prescribes wrong treatments.
marketingStep3Desc: Charge an initial setup fee, followed by a monthly/annual retainer for updates and hosting. Use JSON backups to transfer setups easily!
presetsDesc: Create custom clinic presets or save your current setup as a new template to switch anytime!
saveCurrentAsPresetDesc: Your profile, services, guidelines, and quick action buttons will be saved as a reusable preset.
createBlankPresetDesc: Start with a clean slate to set up a new clinic from scratch.
noCustomPresetsText: No custom presets found. Save your current setup as a preset to start!
conversationsDesc: Track active chat sessions, gauge patient satisfaction, and fine-tune safety settings.
strictSafeguardDesc: Completely bars medical advice. Confines chat strictly to rates, procedures, and contact.
moderateSafeguardDesc: Allows generic preventive health tips with reminders to see the physician.
aiToneDesc: Alters the phrasing style of instant chatbot responses.
doctorMsgPlaceholder: e.g., Hello, I reviewed your symptoms, I will be waiting for your visit...
notif_reminder_sent: Reminder sent successfully and patient alerted via chatbot! 🔔📲
notif_booking_reactivated: Booking reactivated and set to pending. 🔄
notif_delete_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to permanently delete patient "{{name}}"'s booking from the clinic database?
notif_clinic_unavailable: Sorry, this clinic is currently unavailable.
notif_welcome_clinic: Welcome to the official website of {{name}} 👋
notif_trial_abused: ⚠️ Sorry, the trial package has already been activated on this device! To prevent abuse, please upgrade to 'Starter' or 'Pro' package, or log in with your previous account.
notif_clinic_created: Welcome Dr. {{name}}! Your clinic account has been created and subscription activated successfully 🎉
notif_logged_out: Logged out from SaaS safely. See you soon, Doctor! 👋
notif_subscription_upgraded: Subscription upgraded to {{plan}} plan successfully! Thank you for subscribing 💳✨
notif_install_success: Congratulations! The clinic dashboard has been successfully installed on your device as a native app 🎉
notif_install_manual: Installation is ready! Please follow the simple manual browser instructions below to install instantly. 📥
notif_install_started: Installation started successfully! We are glad you are using the native version. 🎉
notif_install_cancelled: Installation cancelled. You can always install later with a click.
notif_install_error: An error occurred during automatic installation. Please follow the manual steps below.
notif_notifications_not_supported: Sorry, your current browser does not support live push notifications.
notif_notifications_enabled: Awesome! Push notifications activated successfully to capture your attention for new bookings 🔔
notif_notif_welcome: Welcome to the Live Notifications System! 🔔
notif_notif_desc: Clinic notifications activated successfully. Live booking updates will appear here instantly.
notif_notif_denied: Notification permission denied. Please enable them manually from browser settings (padlock icon next to link).
notif_notif_error: An error occurred while requesting notification permission.
notif_enter_preset_name: Please enter the name of the new template.
notif_preset_saved: Your new custom template: {{name}} was saved successfully! 💾
notif_enter_blank_preset_name: Please enter the clinic / template name.

pdfTranslations.previewTitle: Preview and Review of the Official Medical Report & Analysis
pdfTranslations.reportTitle: Preliminary Medical Consultation & Patient Interaction Report
pdfTranslations.section1Title: First: Session Analysis & Medical AI Indicators 📊
pdfTranslations.urgentRecommendation: The patient complains of acute symptoms related to pain or bleeding. Random drug advice has been strictly blocked by the medical safeguard system to guarantee safety. Reception staff are recommended to call immediately to confirm and coordinate urgent clinical checkup.
pdfTranslations.normalRecommendation: The consultation relates to general service or educational inquiry (e.g., prices or common procedures). The patient was provided with accurate details and has booked an initial appointment successfully to ensure continued care.
pdfTranslations.section2TitlePrint: Second: Verified Chat Transcript for Emergency Report 💬
pdfTranslations.disclaimerText: This report represents a precise automated summary of the initial exploratory conversation conducted via the AI-powered clinic assistant. It does not replace or substitute for direct clinical examination or diagnostic radiology. Any prescriptions must be clinically issued and signed manually by the treating physician.
